ItacPersonItem.Notes: Th Acta eruditorum anno 1691 (Lipsiae 1691), p. 388: reviewed the following publication (with one plate): Abortus bicorporeus monoceps romae A. 1691 editus in Academia Physico-mathematica examinatus a Francisco de Honophriis M.D.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
